01-basic.title: Basic List
01-basic.description: A simple list displaying basic items with selection and interaction support.

02-review-queue.title: Review Queue
02-review-queue.description: A compact checklist for work that can be completed directly from each row.

03-notification-rules.title: Notification Rules
03-notification-rules.description: Rows can combine a leading checkbox with a trailing Select action.

04-quota-editor.title: Quota Editor
04-quota-editor.description: Inline inputs work as row actions without taking over the List primitive.

05-permissions-matrix.title: Permissions Matrix
05-permissions-matrix.description: A parent checkbox can summarize rows that also expose per-row Select controls.
